SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LINCOLN CHU--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALL-WAYS TRAVEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIPSON, TRACY $1,318.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,403.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
